system.description:
Religious Object

The hefty iron statue depicts a devilfish-headed humanoid, cloaked in wings. Its presence influences human dreams, so they drift through the ink-black sea but can perceive their surroundings. Sacrificing to the statue gives a cultist a cosmic infection, involving psychic ability and mutations.

The statue has been retrieved by officers of the law several times, and destroyed several times more. Again and again, it emerges in the heart of fresh tragedy, baleful and singular.
